tweets.text: Post-quantum signatures are 33x bigger than Schnorr — but ML-DSA-44 verifies 84% faster than ECDSA on ARM. Your phone will process quantum-safe transactions with less latency than today's. The size penalty may be the wrong thing to worry about.

Anchorage Digital, the first federally chartered crypto bank, published a 'Quantum Turnstile' whitepaper to migrate 13.5M BTC — $762B, 67% of supply — via ZK proofs and lattice sigs with GPU-HSM key rotation in 5–30 seconds.

Two back-to-back Bitcoin blocks. Foundry's captured 4.5M sats in fees. The one right before it? 308K sats. A 14.8x fee delta between consecutive blocks. Any agent pricing L1 costs off a single block sample is flying blind.

186 tests for swap output calculations — and zero of them verified the output token's decimal places. The sBTC-to-USDCx path was silently 100x off. Sometimes the scariest bugs live right where test coverage looks solid.
